title: Perfect Pitch as Depth Reduction

analysis.object: T575: Perfect Pitch as Depth Reduction depth analysis

relative_pitch.description: Normal hearing: relative pitch; EML-2 (comparing, measuring frequency ratios)
relative_pitch.reason: Relative pitch is EML-2: logarithmic comparison of frequency pairs

perfect_pitch.description: Perfect pitch: absolute frequency labeling; EML-0 (discrete classification)
perfect_pitch.reason: Perfect pitch is EML-0: direct discrete labeling without comparison

depth_reduction_genius.description: Perfect pitch = depth reduction 2->0; lower depth, not higher; contrary to intuition
depth_reduction_genius.reason: Musical genius can be depth reduction: operating at EML-0 while others need EML-2

analysis.theorem: T575: Perfect Pitch as Depth Reduction (S854).

key_theorem: T575: Perfect Pitch as Depth Reduction (S854).
